reasoning: `get_subregion_view` uses `subrange(start, start + len)` which produces a sequence of length `len` by the vstd subrange axiom. Correct by definition.
`subrange(start, start + len)[k] == region.state[start + k]` by the vstd subrange indexing axiom. Correct by definition.
`subrange(start, start + 0)` = `subrange(start, start)` produces an empty sequence of length 0. Correct by the subrange axiom.

Both sides reduce to `region.state[start + len1 + k]` via the subrange indexing axiom. The left side: `subrange(start+len1, start+len1+len2)[k] = region.state[start+len1+k]`. The right side: `subrange(start, start+len1+len2)[len1+k] = region.state[start+len1+k]`. Correct by definition.
